Mixed martial arts events
2007 in Shooto
Information
First dateJanuary 26, 2007
Last dateDecember 8, 2007
Events
Total events22
Fights
Total fights168
Title fights4
Chronology
2006 in Shooto 2007 in Shooto 2008 in Shooto

The year 2007 is the 19th year in the history of Shooto, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Japan. In 2007 Shooto held 22 events beginning with, Shooto: Battle Mix Tokyo 1.

Title fights

[edit]
Title fights in 2007
Weight class Method Round Time Event Notes
Welterweight Shinya Aoki (c) def. Akira Kikuchi Decision (Split) 3 5:00 Shooto: Back To Our Roots 1 [a]
Flyweight Shinichi Kojima (c) vs. Yasuhiro Urushitani Draw 3 5:00 Shooto: Back To Our Roots 2 [b]
Featherweight Akitoshi Tamura def. Takeshi Inoue (c) Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: Back To Our Roots 3 [c]
Middleweight Siyar Bahadurzada def. Shiko Yamashita Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: Back To Our Roots 4 [d]
  1. ^ For the Welterweight Championship.
  2. ^ For the Flyweight Championship.
  3. ^ For the Featherweight Championship.
  4. ^ For the Middleweight Championship.

Shooto: Battle Mix Tokyo 1

[edit]

Shooto: Battle Mix Tokyo 1[1] was an event held on January 26, 2007, at Yoyogi National Gymnasium in Tokyo, Japan.
